news.t: Capital Group Unveils Five New Active ETFs, Including Its First Multi-Asset ETF

overview.description: The Capital Group Short Duration Municipal Income ETF (CGSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages a portfolio of US municipal bonds exempt from regular federal income tax. The portfolio is mostly comprised of investment grade debts and the average portfolio duration is expected to be one year. CGSM was launched on Sep 26, 2023 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.title: When the going gets tough, the tough get… "active"?
data.text: When the going gets tough, the tough get… "active"?.

data.title: Capital Group Unveils Five New Active ETFs, Including Its First Multi-Asset ETF
data.text: LOS ANGELES, Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Capital Group launched five active exchange-traded funds (ETFs) today on the New York Stock Exchange. This compelling lineup includes its first-ever multi-a...
